CFB.Settings.BridgeUrl.Name: Bridge URL
CFB.Settings.BridgeUrl.Hint: WebSocket endpoint of the Companion bridge Worker. Default: wss://bridge.companion-products.org/ws
CFB.Settings.ApiKey.Name: API Key
CFB.Settings.ApiKey.Hint: Shared secret. Must match the BRIDGE_API_KEY set on the Worker and the Companion (Supabase) secret.
CFB.Settings.AutoConnect.Name: Auto-connect on startup
CFB.Settings.AutoConnect.Hint: Connect to the bridge automatically when the world loads (GM only).
CFB.Settings.StatusMenu.Name: Connection Status
CFB.Settings.StatusMenu.Label: Open Status Panel
CFB.Settings.StatusMenu.Hint: View the bridge connection status, recent logs, and reconnect.
CFB.Status.Title: Companion Bridge — Status
CFB.Notify.NoApiKey: Companion bridge: no API key set. Configure it in the module settings.
